objective: Fiabiliser MissionPulse et les donnees recuperees via correctifs critiques, hygiene des donnees, resilience des parsers et alignement de la documentation

reason: context files created

content: Fixed notification filter to pass seenIds instead of []
reason: Prevents duplicate notifications for already-seen high-score missions

content: Added withResultRetry helper for Result<T, AppError> pattern
reason: Existing withRetry uses exception-based retry; Result pattern needs explicit error handling

content: Updated scanner to use withResultRetry and added parser health tracking
reason: Result-aware retry integrates with AppError's isRetryable flag; parser health detects anomalies

content: Added Zod validation to getSettings() with fallback to defaults
reason: Invalid stored settings should not crash the extension

content: Created pure parser-output validator in core
reason: Runtime validation catches malformed parser outputs before they propagate

content: Hardened collective-parser with defensive __NEXT_DATA__ navigation
reason: Platform uses React SPA; structure may change unexpectedly

content: Added purgeOldMissions() to remove missions older than 90 days
reason: Prevents unbounded IndexedDB growth; called after each scan

content: Limited seenMissionIds storage to 2000 IDs
reason: Prevents unbounded chrome.storage growth; keeps most recent IDs

content: Trigger semantic cache cleanup on service worker startup
reason: Expired entries accumulate; cleanup on startup is safe and low-overhead

content: Removed deprecated connectorRegistry export
reason: Empty array kept for backward compatibility; all consumers should use async getConnector()

content: Removed dead Comet connector and parser
reason: Comet not registered in CONNECTOR_REGISTRY; code was unused

content: Updated AGENTS.md to remove TJM pipeline references
reason: TJM pipeline was never implemented; docs now reflect actual Gemini Nano semantic scoring

content: Added withResultRetry in retry-strategy.ts - tests for Result-aware retry would be valuable
Added validate-parser-output.ts in core - can be tested without mocks
Added parser-health.ts in shell - needs chrome.storage mock for tests

reason: Added withResultRetry to mock
Updated test expectation for hardened parser validation

content: Created app-error.test.ts for isRetryable/isFatal/serializeError/deserializeError
reason: Core error handling needs unit test coverage for retry logic

content: Created type-guards.test.ts for runtime type validation
reason: Type guards are critical for parser output validation - need coverage

content: Updated chrome-storage.test.ts with Zod validation fallback tests
reason: Settings validation fallback to defaults needs test coverage

content: Updated mark-seen.test.ts with MAX_SEEN_IDS boundary tests
reason: Pruning behavior at 500 limit needs edge case coverage

content: Updated connector-actor.test.ts with non-retryable error tests
reason: Verify no retries on 403 Forbidden (non-retryable error)

content: Updated collective.test.ts with malformed data handling tests
reason: Hardened parser needs tests for invalid entry filtering

content: purgeOldMissions() logic mentioned in context but not found in db.ts - may need implementation in future run
Notification filtering already has excellent coverage in notification-filter.test.ts - no new tests needed

reason: Cleaned up corrupted file and added test coverage summary

content: Fixed validate-parser-output.ts: removed console.warn side effect, aligned scrapedAt to Date type
reason: Core code must be pure - no I/O; Mission type defines scrapedAt as Date, not number

content: Aligned MAX_SEEN_IDS to 2000 in mark-seen.ts (was 500, inconsistent with shell layer)
reason: Target retention is 2000; both layers must agree to prevent confusion
Updated expected MAX_SEEN_IDS to 2000

content: Removed unused purgeOldMissions import from background/index.ts
reason: Import was never used in the file

content: Removed console.warn side effects from collective-parser.ts to preserve core purity
reason: Core code cannot have I/O side effects; callers can log if needed

description: validateMission accepts null for description (line 59) but Mission.description is typed as non-nullable string; null values pass validation and create a type lie
parserId parameter in validateParserOutput (line 98) is unused after console.warn removal in run 4; dead parameter
Core file imports from shell: import type { AppSettings } from '../../shell/storage/chrome-storage' (line 8); pre-existing but violates Core→Shell boundary
Pre-existing: 5 occurrences of new Date() default params (lines 55,102,153,218,235) violate Core purity; not introduced by this feature but worth noting
context.md line 57 claims purgeOldMissions is 'Not implemented' and 'future work' (lines 85) but db.ts has it implemented at lines 170-209 and scanner.ts calls it at line 245; stale documentation

content: Fixed validateMission to require description as non-nullable string
reason: Mission.description is typed as string (not string | null); null values passing validation created runtime type lie

content: Removed unused parserId parameter from validateParserOutput()
reason: Parameter became dead code after console.warn removal in run 4

content: Updated context.md to reflect purgeOldMissions() implementation status
reason: Function was implemented in run 2 (db.ts:170-209) but context incorrectly stated 'Not implemented'

content: Reviewed the post-correction reliability hardening diff and found no new cross-file conflicts in the feature scope
reason: Core-shell boundaries, retention limits, parser validation, and targeted tests are coherent after the correction loop; only pre-existing validator notes remain out of scope
Removed a duplicated test case and cleaned malformed fixture formatting during integration review

description: Removed duplicated collective parser test and normalized fixture layout
reason: Improved clarity without changing behavior
Added concise integration summary and corrected final path/retention details

description: Pre-existing: type-only import from shell (import type { AppSettings } from shell/storage/chrome-storage) — violates dependency direction but no runtime impact. Out of feature scope.
Pre-existing: 5× new Date() as default params (lines 55, 102, 153, 218, 235) — violates core purity. Out of feature scope.
No test coverage for parser-health.ts (requires chrome.storage mock). Documented as future work in context.md.

content: Extended reliability hardening scope to revive Hiway via JSON/Supabase source instead of brittle SPA HTML scraping
reason: User selected the Hiway implementation path after evidence showed a stable REST data source behind the React shell
new scoped task: Hiway JSON connector implementation

content: Added disabled state tests for Hiway connector
reason: Hiway remains disabled (SPA React issues); tests document the disabled state and verify parser availability for future JSON implementation

content: Hiway remains disabled - when JSON/Supabase implementation is ready: (1) create hiway-json-parser.ts following collective pattern, (2) update connector to use JSON endpoint, (3) register in CONNECTOR_REGISTRY

reason: Added Hiway test coverage section and run 8 to history

content: JSON parser hiway-json-parser.ts is fully tested (17 tests). Ready to enable when Supabase credentials are discovered.

reason: Convert from brittle HTML scraping to reliable JSON fetching via Supabase REST API

content: Updated Hiway connector to use JSON fetching with Supabase REST API
reason: HTML scraping fails on SPA; JSON endpoint provides stable data access

content: Hiway remains disabled until Supabase credentials are discovered from site bundle
reason: Connector guards against placeholder config; safe failure mode prevents broken scans

content: JSON parser is pure and fully testable. Shell connector has config guard that returns error on placeholder values.
